title: Joe's Selling Bin
description: A configurable block that automatically sells items placed inside it at midnight
body: **This mod is not plug and play. We highly encourage developers to configure it to their specific needs.** The Selling Bin is a block that, at midnight, converts any items inside it taggest as sellable. It comes in three tiers, with each upgrade adding more slots. Selling Bins have player-specific shared inventories, similar to Ender Chests.
